description: 8-turn conversation establishing a research methodology preference. Tests recall of a single knowledge/identity fact.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: My methodology is always source-first: I never cite a claim without at least two independent primary sources.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Understood — source-first methodology, no claim cited without at least two independent primary sources.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Pull together background on the new battery chemistry.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Here's the background, with each claim backed by two independent primary sources per your methodology: ...

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Good. Flag anything that only has one source.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Flagged — two claims currently rest on a single source and need a second.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Remind me what my research methodology is.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Source-first: never cite a claim without at least two independent primary sources.

gold_answers.research_methodology: Source-first; at least two independent primary sources per claim
